falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: The real blocker is worker readiness or queue health, not reconciliation/projection/status.
falsificationQueries: Inspect live V3 campaign snapshot for task queue readiness and stuck items
Check whether runs are mostly unbound, paused, or errored
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: The live cohort snapshot showed both task queues healthy, all 18 runs active, and no current stuck items, which weakens a worker-readiness explanation.
